approval_scope: Approved within the declared routes and browser matrix for visual, automated accessibility, responsive-layout, keyboard, provenance and prohibited-content checks. This approval does not establish universal accessibility-standard compliance and does not confirm an independent manual VoiceOver review.
findings: The refreshed full browser matrix passed 64 of 64 tests across Chromium desktop and mobile, Firefox and WebKit.
The 44 commit-bound screenshots and machine-readable packet cover the declared visual, responsive-layout, keyboard, automated accessibility, provenance and prohibited-content checks.
Universal WCAG conformance and independent manual VoiceOver confirmation are outside this approval.
remediation_or_waiver: No unresolved finding is recorded within the approved scope. Independent manual VoiceOver review remains explicitly out of scope.

assistive_technology: Playwright keyboard and semantic accessibility assertions
